Author: Mei, Catphinaud
Name: Oh Hey! Fork
Description:
This plugin notifies you when someone targets you, or emotes at you.

Commands:
  /ohheyfork - Opens the main window
  /ohheyfork main - Opens the main window
  /ohheyfork [config|settings] - Opens the settings window
  /ohheyfork help - Displays the help message (will also display on invalid sub-commands)
Punchline: Ever wanted to get notified when someone targets you or emotes at you? Now you can!
